item.title: Minecraft Tower Defense [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Minecraft Tower Defense [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Minecraft Tower Defense
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Play Minecraft Tower Defense game now!
Minecraft Tower Defense is a strategy and defense game inspired by Minecraft. In the game, your mission is to defend your base and fight the creatures that are coming to your tower.
You need to create a winding path to distract monsters to your tower, with a lot of traps placed on that path such as egg throwing tower, lake, archery tower, bomb... After each wave of monsters attack object, you have more resources to upgrade and build more defense weapons to stop the enemies.
Minecraft Tower Defense is really attractive and addictive!

Features:

Choose from a variety of defensive towers and weapons
Build a complex path to misdirect your enemies
Try to survive as many waves as possible!
[read more]
item.description:
Minecraft Tower Defense
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Play Minecraft Tower Defense game now!
Minecraft Tower Defense is a strategy and defense game inspired by Minecraft. In the game, your mission is to defend your base and fight the creatures that are coming to your tower.
You need to create a winding path to distract monsters to your tower, with a lot of traps placed on that path such as egg throwing tower, lake, archery tower, bomb... After each wave of monsters attack object, you have more resources to upgrade and build more defense weapons to stop the enemies.
Minecraft Tower Defense is really attractive and addictive!

Features:

Choose from a variety of defensive towers and weapons
Build a complex path to misdirect your enemies
Try to survive as many waves as possible!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Minecraft Tower Defense
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Play Minecraft Tower Defense game now!
Minecraft Tower Defense is a strategy and defense game inspired by Minecraft. In the game, your mission is to defend your base and fight the creatures that are coming to your tower.
You need to create a winding path to distract monsters to your tower, with a lot of traps placed on that path such as egg throwing tower, lake, archery tower, bomb... After each wave of monsters attack object, you have more resources to upgrade and build more defense weapons to stop the enemies.
Minecraft Tower Defense is really attractive and addictive!

Features:

Choose from a variety of defensive towers and weapons
Build a complex path to misdirect your enemies
Try to survive as many waves as possible!
[read more]

item.title: Minecraft Tower Defense 2 [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Minecraft Tower Defense 2 [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Minecraft Tower Defense 2
(Tactics & Strategy)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Here is a link to the 1st part of the game
https://www.appimagehub.com/p/2014358

Plot:
After buying Minecraft, Steve logged on to one of the greatest rated servers online! His journey began here, in 'Happyville'.
Seeing others' houses Steve starts learning the ropes of Minecraft! He begins his first hut to survive the night!
But the hut won't help him now...
Out of nowhere, a white eyed griefer emerged and exploded the entire Village! Most players left the server, the rest whereobliterated...
All but Steve, who fled to the forests.
Lost, worried and alone, Steve found a previously built boat near a vast ocean,
Instinctively, he got in and sailed for his life!
Leaving behind 'Happyville', Steve sails away into the distance to hopefully escape the griefer and find new players,
[read more]

Linux offline version of the popular game
Here is a link to the 1st part of the game
https://www.appimagehub.com/p/2014358

Plot:
After buying Minecraft, Steve logged on to one of the greatest rated servers online! His journey began here, in 'Happyville'.
Seeing others' houses Steve starts learning the ropes of Minecraft! He begins his first hut to survive the night!
But the hut won't help him now...
Out of nowhere, a white eyed griefer emerged and exploded the entire Village! Most players left the server, the rest whereobliterated...
All but Steve, who fled to the forests.
Lost, worried and alone, Steve found a previously built boat near a vast ocean,
Instinctively, he got in and sailed for his life!
Leaving behind 'Happyville', Steve sails away into the distance to hopefully escape the griefer and find new players,
[read more]

item.title: Fireboy and Watergirl in The Forest Temple [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Fireboy and Watergirl in The Forest Temple [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Fireboy and Watergirl in The Forest Temple
(Tactics & Strategy)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Help FireBoy and WaterGirl in their adventure! Control both characters at the same time to solve platformer puzzles!
Activate buttons and levers to move platforms, push boxes and roll balls, collect all the diamonds and get each character to his door!
Controls

Use A,W,D to move WaterGirl and the ArrowKeys to move FireBoy.
Click the green gem on the bottom of the screen or press "P" to pause the game.

[read more]
item.description:
Fireboy and Watergirl in The Forest Temple
(Tactics & Strategy)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Help FireBoy and WaterGirl in their adventure! Control both characters at the same time to solve platformer puzzles!
Activate buttons and levers to move platforms, push boxes and roll balls, collect all the diamonds and get each character to his door!
Controls

Use A,W,D to move WaterGirl and the ArrowKeys to move FireBoy.
Click the green gem on the bottom of the screen or press "P" to pause the game.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fireboy and Watergirl in The Forest Temple
(Tactics & Strategy)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Help FireBoy and WaterGirl in their adventure! Control both characters at the same time to solve platformer puzzles!
Activate buttons and levers to move platforms, push boxes and roll balls, collect all the diamonds and get each character to his door!
Controls

Use A,W,D to move WaterGirl and the ArrowKeys to move FireBoy.
Click the green gem on the bottom of the screen or press "P" to pause the game.

[read more]

item.title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]

More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options

item.title: Gun Mayhem [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Gun Mayhem [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Gun Mayhem
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters
Controls

***Controls can be edited in game option***
Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

[read more]
item.description:
Gun Mayhem
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters

***Controls can be edited in game option***
Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

Gun Mayhem

Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters

***Controls can be edited in game option***
Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

item.title: Netflix Appimage [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: Netflix Appimage [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Netflix Appimage
(TV & Streaming)
Unofficial netflix appimage
you will need qt6 installed

i made this so i dont need chrome anymore but enjoy! 😉
[read more]

item.title: Telegram-Desktop [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Telegram-Desktop [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Telegram-Desktop
(Chat & Messenging)
i noticed the other unofficial version of telegram-deskop on this store was out of date
so i created this appimage for people
package created 02/09/2024
you will need qt6 installed

v1.02 08-05-2025
new fixes and blue border

v1.01
updated appimage fixing issues with it not working


i am not the developer i am just creating an appimage
[read more]

item.title: Fb Messanger Appimage [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Fb Messanger Appimage [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Fb Messanger Appimage
(Chat & Messenging)
Unofficial Facebook Messanger Appimage
you will need qt6 installed

cool little application just making it easier to get on facebook messanger

v1.01
new fixes and blue border

v1.0
everything seems to be working
it should save logins if you select it to upon login
[read more]

item.title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Perplexity AI App
(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

[read more]
item.description:
